topic: Highest-earning tip menu items (practitioner data, token-site averages)
summary: Community research across 273 menu items (Creators Spicy Tea dataset) plus practitioner reports shows that high tip velocity comes from a specific mix: many low-ticket affection items (most volume), a handful of mid-tier pose/outfit items (anchor the session), and 2–3 premium items that exist for whales to find. The actual highest-revenue item for most rooms isn't an act — it's the recurring 'affection' micro-tip driven by a Lovense vibration pattern.
keyPoints: Lovense Lush random-vibration tips (15–50 tokens) — highest total volume item in most rooms; look at any top-featured Chaturbate room and count the 1-token tips flying, they're Lush-driven
Tiered vibe intensity menu (15/33/77/155 tokens → tease/medium/high/MAX) — gives viewers agency over intensity, commonly used
Goal-pacing items (cumulative token goal items) — 'snap show' at 500, 'shower show' at 1000, 'oil show' at 1500 — the goal bar is the room's shared mission for the session
Outfit changes (150–400 tokens) — high perceived value because it 'costs' the performer a setup break but viewers see theatrical reveal; best priced at round numbers (200, 250, 300)
Stocking/lingerie reveals (100–300 tokens each) — reliable mid-tier item; named sub-items ('thigh-highs off', 'garter off', 'bra strap') add granularity
Named pose triggers (77–177 tokens) — pose categories from the archetypes shipped artifact (Ariel, Goddess, Kitten, Pin-up)
Interaction items: 'say your name' (30 tokens), 'sing a line' (55 tokens), 'read a message aloud' (75 tokens) — cheap items that drive chat engagement and reward tippers with recognition
Games/gambling: spin-the-wheel (100 tokens), dice roll (50 tokens), countdown (tip X in Y minutes → unlock Z) — gamification lifts AOV 15–30%
Premium tier for whales: Snapchat access (500), WhatsApp/GFE (1000–2000), custom video (1500–5000), private-show minimum entry — these don't fire often but when they do it's 10x a normal tip
Private-message paid item (25–50 tokens) — filters out spam/freeloaders from genuine PMs; recommended in every room with meaningful viewer count
DECOY EFFECT on time-based items: price 3-min at X tokens and 5-min at just-slightly-more (e.g. 3 min = 200, 5 min = 275). The 5-min feels like obvious value and most tippers choose it
Every menu item should have a UNIQUE token amount — so you know what was tipped for without asking or checking notes

sources.title: Chaturbate Tip Prices Explained: 273 menu-item dataset (Creators Spicy Tea)
